Major international funding initiatives to develop new tools
US BRAINS Initiative: Brain Research through Advancing Innovative Neurotech
European Human Brain Project: Record all 77m neurons in mouse
Era of Big Data
** Will this information be useful for understanding complex
behavior and thought?
Good discussion in:
Krakauer et al. Neuroscience Needs Behavior: Correcting a Reductionist
Bias. Neuron. 2017, 93:480-490.

Problem 2
A mountain climber wakes up in the morning, ready for an
overnight trip to the top of Mt. Shasta. She leaves at 8 am
following the well-worn path on the north slope and reaches the
summit at 8 pm. After a night of star gazing, she begins her
descent at 8 am the next morning and reaches the bottom at 8 pm.
Assuming she follows the same path on the way down, can she
cross a position on her descent that she had crossed exactly 24
hours earlier?
iClicker, Part A:
a.
Yes
b.
No
c.
Maybe
